summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that ADI is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $398.22. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 55.6%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $436.30. This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
